name: @qvac/tts-ggml
description: Text to Speech (TTS) addon for qvac (ggml backend, wrapping the chatterbox + supertonic engines from tts-cpp)

scripts.build: bare-make generate && bare-make build && bare-make install
scripts.example: bare examples/chatterbox-tts.js "Hello from qvac tts ggml."
scripts.example:chatterbox: bare examples/chatterbox-tts.js "Hello from qvac tts ggml."
scripts.example:chatterbox-mtl: bare examples/chatterbox-mtl-tts.js "Hello from the multilingual Chatterbox engine."
scripts.example:supertonic-mtl: bare examples/supertonic-mtl-tts.js "Hello from the multilingual Supertonic engine."
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:cpp:build: bare-make generate -D BUILD_TESTING=ON && bare-make build --target tts_ggml_tests && bare-make install
scripts.test:cpp: npm run test:cpp:build && npm run test:cpp:run
scripts.coverage:cpp:build: bare-make generate -D BUILD_TESTING=ON -D ENABLE_COVERAGE=ON && bare-make build --target tts_ggml_tests
scripts.coverage:cpp:report: cd build && ls -lha && llvm-profdata merge -sparse default.profraw -o coverage.profdata && llvm-cov show ./tts_ggml_tests -instr-profile=coverage.profdata -format=html -output-dir=coverage-html -ignore-filename-regex='(tests|build|node_modules|gtest|gmock|\.vcpkg|/usr)/' && llvm-cov export ./tts_ggml_tests -instr-profile=coverage.profdata -format=lcov -ignore-filename-regex='(tests|build|node_modules|gtest|gmock|\.vcpkg|/usr)/' > lcov.info && npm run coverage:cpp:summary
scripts.coverage:cpp: npm run coverage:cpp:build && npm run test:cpp:run && npm run coverage:cpp:report
